scenes.description: 春秋时期越国美女西施
scenes.prompt: Ancient Chinese village at dawn, a beautiful woman named Xishi walking gracefully by the river, traditional ink painting style, soft morning light, serene atmosphere
Xishi suffering from heart pain, pressing her chest with both hands, furrowed brow, yet still breathtakingly beautiful, traditional Chinese ink painting, emotional expression
An ugly girl named Dongshi hiding behind a tree, watching Xishi from the shadows, envious expression, traditional Chinese ink painting, contrast between light and dark
Dongshi imitating Xishi, pressing her chest with both hands, furrowing her brow, walking through the village, but looking grotesque and unnatural, traditional Chinese ink painting, comedic tone
Villagers looking at Dongshi with fear and disgust, running away in terror, children crying, traditional Chinese ink painting, dramatic reaction
Moral of the story: blind imitation without self-awareness only makes things worse, traditional Chinese calligraphy style, wisdom text, serene background
